system.description:
What it does (SRD): When the creature makes a full attack that includes its primary natural weapon, its secondary natural weapons are rolled with a reduced attack penalty compared to the usual full-attack stacking. The Monster Manual phrasing is typically secondary attacks at −5 from the creature’s best natural attack bonus, or only −2 behind the primary when the primary natural weapon is a bite.

ThirdEra: This item leaves Mechanical effects empty on its Details tab. Natural attack bonuses come from the NPC sheet’s Natural attacks list: mark each attack as primary or secondary; the sheet uses full melee for primaries and full melee − 5 for secondaries unless you enter a preset attack bonus on a row so it matches the printed stat block (for example, true dragons where secondaries are only −2 behind the bite).
